title: Prism Background
description: OGL WebGL procedural prism/pyramid with three configurable animation modes (rotate, hover, 3drotate) and full color control, serving as a shimmering geometric hero background.
prompt_text:
# Prism Background

OGL WebGL procedural prism/pyramid with three configurable animation modes (rotate, hover, 3drotate) and full color control, serving as a shimmering geometric hero background.

## Use when
- Creating a dramatic geometric hero background for a dark landing page.
- Adding a premium 3D prism as the centerpiece of a product showcase.
- Building a first-load reveal with an interactive, rotating prism effect.

## Stack
- Framework: react
- Libraries: ogl

## Install
```bash
npm install ogl
```

## Component — prism-background.tsx
```tsx
// Source: animations_015.md
// Export: PrismBackground (default)
// Props: className, style, animationMode ('rotate'|'hover'|'3drotate'),
//   colors (string[]), speed (number), size (number)
// Uses OGL Renderer, Program, Mesh, Geometry, Vec2, Vec3, Mat4
// Procedural prism geometry with reflective GLSL shader
// See full source in raw/animations_015.md
```

## Notes
- Requires OGL (~100 KB). Lazy-load for performance.
